title: High stakes battle in Sheohar as rival candidates file affidavits
snippet_text: The election filing process completed today in Sheohar. Multi-millionaire candidates and independent leaders enter the fray, making the contest highly unpredictable.

title: Voter turnout expected to touch record highs in Sheohar
snippet_text: Electoral awareness campaigns and intense political mobilization by party workers point to a high turnout of youth and women voters in Sheohar constituency.

title: Welfare scheme execution becomes election issue in Sheohar
snippet_text: Local reports indicate that MGNREGA work allocations and PMAY home delivery rates are taking center stage in public debates across Sheohar assembly segment.

title: Bihar Elections 2025: Key issues dominate debates in Sheohar
snippet_text: As the election campaign intensifies, voters in Sheohar assembly constituency raise questions about infrastructure development, road connectivity, and agricultural support schemes.
